hero.art_prompt: Kabir, a 27 year old Indian man in smart-casual, excited and confident, studying a rising engagement graph on a laptop, modern home office, creative and aspirational.

panels.narration: Kabir was already good at growing brands online at work.
panels.dialogue: I could make any brand grow online.
panels.img_prompt: Kabir, 27, cheerfully running online campaigns on a laptop and phone, engagement rising, creative energetic mood, modern room.

panels.narration: But the next step needed an MBA he did not have.
panels.dialogue: How do I lead digital growth?
panels.img_prompt: Kabir looking thoughtful, wondering how to move from running posts to leading digital strategy, laptop open, tidy office.

panels.narration: Then he found an online MBA in Digital Marketing & E-commerce.
panels.dialogue: I can grow without quitting my job!
panels.img_prompt: Kabir's face lighting up at a laptop showing an online MBA in Digital Marketing and E-commerce, warm hopeful glow.

panels.narration: Kabir enrolled and began leading with confidence.
panels.img_prompt: Kabir confidently starting his first digital marketing lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why An MBA In Digital Marketing & E-commerce
points: Master the real craft: SEO, social media, performance ads, e-commerce and marketing analytics.
Apply real AI tools for business from your very first semester.
₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ online MBA employers and promotions recognise.
